Veterans Benefits: New York provides veterans services, property-tax exemptions for eligible veterans, education assistance, and employment preferences.
LGBTQSource: HRC 2025 Municipal Equality Index; Ithaca received a perfect score
Description: Ithaca is a compact Finger Lakes college city anchored by Cornell University and Ithaca College, with a local VA clinic, highly rated LGBTQ municipal policy, waterfalls and trail access, and strong arts and cultural amenities. It offers a strongly liberal civic environment and outdoor recreation, balanced by snowy winters, a high New York tax burden, and college-town housing costs.
